rulings.Case Title: JO ANN FARESE VS. CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jpmorgan Chase Bank, N.A., And California Reconveyance Company Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 20, 2012, line 1. Defendant JPmorgan Chase Bank, N.A., And California Reconveyance Company Demurrer To First Amended Complaint Overruled as to Causes of Actions 9, 10, 12, 13, & 14. Sustained without leave to amend Cause of Action 1. Failed to Amend. Sustained with leave to amend Causes of Action 2, 4, 11, 5 & 6 as follows: COA 2: sustain with one last LTA to plead injunctive relief as a remedy appurtenant to another independent COA and not as a COA. COA 4, 11: Leave to amend one last time to allege facts showing Chase acting outside scope of "mere lending." Nymark v. Heart Fed. Sav & Loan Assn. COA 5: one last LTA to plead a non-privileged communication/basis for liability. COA 6: one last LTA to plead the requirements of CCP 761.020, and tender/exception from tender rule.

rulings.Case Title: ERWIN GONZALEZ VS. AURORA LOAN SERVICE, LL, A DELAWARE LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Aurora Loan Service, Llc; Greenpoint Mortgage Funding, Inc.; Mortgage Electronic Registration System, Inc.'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 20, 2012, line 2. Defendants Aurora Loan Service, Llc; Greenpoint Mortgage Funding, Inc.; Mortgage Electronic Registration System, Inc.'s Demurrer To Complaint Off Calendar failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C second time. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIOANL TRUST COMPANY, VS. WILLIAM BAILES et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 20, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIOANL TRUST COMPANY, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny Motion for Summary Judgment. Plaintiff failed to carry burden showing no triable issue of fact. 1) Property sold per Civil Code 2924, 2) Defendant Bailes tenancy not subject to San Francisco Rent Ordinance good cause. 3) Defendant Bailes due and owed $2800. month. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NEW CALIFORNIA LAND COMPANY VS. JULIE STRATTON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 20, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT JULIE STRATTON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled 5 days to answer. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES KUNG YUEH VS. EDEN DRAPER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moton To Claim Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 20, 2012, line 5. PLAINTIFF JAMES YUEH's Motion To Claim Attorney Fees Grant attorney fees plus costs in amount of $6175. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE VS. PANFILO ARMAS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 20, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT ARTURO GOMEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend to provide legible attachments to complaint. (501/REQ)

Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 20, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT SARA MILLER, KENYATA KING, ANDRE MILLER, KING, NAOMI (SUED AS NAOMI MILLER) DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained without leave to amend. Notice fatally defective because fails to include phone number and hours. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC VS. BETH HEBEL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 20, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANT BETH HEBEL MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Grant motion to quash. subject to opposition. (501/REQ)
